violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary before putting on gloves.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer buckets for cleaning purposes were not set up at the time of inspection.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device.

Prohibiting animals. — --Live animal on premises was not kept/housed in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Observed a live mouse in the dinning room during inspection.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when putting on gloves.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. A single use portion cup was stored in the diced tomatoes.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
